headline: Winamp Group Announces the Filing of a U.S. Lawsuit Against NVIDIA and a Major Development in the Belgian Proceedings
summary: BRUSSELS, June 23, 2026--Regulatory News: Winamp Group SA (Euronext Growth Brussels and Paris: ALWIN) today announces a significant development in the actions undertaken by its subsidiary Jamendo SA to protect its intellectual property rights and those of the artists it represents in the context of the development of artificial intelligence technologies.
